productDisplayName: Forever New Women Golden Prints Cream Top
description: CompositionCream coloured flared sleeveless top made of 92% viscose and 8% elastane, with gold print, raceback with ruffled panel and elongated back and side hemsFittingRegularWash careCold hand wash separatelyWash garment inside outDo not soak, rub, wring, bleach or tumble dryLine dry in shadeCool iron on reverse sideDo not iron printDo not dry cleanTake feminine dressing to the next level in this cream flared sleeveless top from forever new. The gold print in a brush stroke look in the form of flowers, the ruffled panel at the back and the elongated side and back hems gives this top a dreamy feel. Team this top with white pants, gold chains and gold sandals for a glam look. Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
